hook.text: UNITED DONE DEAL WITH ATALANTA FOR EDERSON

beats.text: CARRICK LANDS HIS FIRST SIGNING OF THE SUMMER
EDERSON ARRIVES FROM ATALANTA FOR AROUND £35M
THE MIDFIELDER AGREES A FOUR-YEAR CONTRACT
FERNANDES IS NOW THE NEXT MIDFIELD TARGET

caption: United have agreed their first summer signing — Éderson Silva arrives from Atalanta for around £35m on a four-year contract. ESPN and Fabrizio Romano confirmed the deal; formal club announcement expected in early July. With Casemiro departing, Carrick has moved fast. Fernandes from West Ham is next. 🔴 Are we finally building a proper midfield?
